top.title: Top US counterterrorism official resigns over Iran war, urging Trump to 'reverse course'
top.summary: National Counterterrorism Center Director Joe Kent says Trump "started this war due to pressure from Israel and its powerful American lobby".

top.title: Air strike hit Kabul rehab centre as patients ate dinner, survivor tells BBC
top.summary: The exact number killed in Monday night's strike by Pakistan is still not known, but is feared to be in the hundreds.

top.title: Israel says it killed Iranian security chief Ali Larijani in air strike
top.summary: The deaths of Larijani and the head of the paramilitary Basij force have not been confirmed by Iranian authorities.

top.title: Nvidia faces gamer backlash over 'breakthrough' AI graphics feature
top.summary: Nvidia says the tool will transform game graphics - critics warn it could squeeze out artistic expression.

top.title: AI firm Anthropic seeks weapons expert to stop users from 'misuse'
top.summary: The artificial intelligence firm says it wants to prevent "catastrophic misuse" of its systems.

top.title: Teens sue Musk's xAI over Grok's pornographic images of them
top.summary: Musk's AI chatbot has created millions of fake sexualised images, experts say.
